headline.text: L1 S2 enrober failed *three* allergen tests after cleaning — root cause is incomplete disassembly inspection — line cleared at 06:04.

summary: Two plant-level near-misses today: L2 ML3 cross-conveyor belt shredding into product zone (replaced, ATP passed), and L3 ML1 loose motor screw caught before it fell. L1 S2 enrober allergen failures delayed startup ~6 hours.

food_safety.title: Cross-conveyor belt shredding on ML3
food_safety.summary: Belt breaking apart in product zone — line stopped, belt replaced, ATP tested and passed before restart.
food_safety.status: Resolved — belt replaced by 14:51, ATP passed, line restarted.

food_safety.title: Loose screw on ML1 motor M260
food_safety.summary: Operator found loose screw during belt inspection and tightened before it could fall into product stream.
food_safety.status: Resolved on shift — operator tightened screw, no product impact.

quality.title: 246 lbs scrap from damaged molds on ML4
quality.summary: Damaged molds already in system at shift start generated one barrel of scrap during capture test.
quality.status: Open — scrap collected, no update on mold removal or inspection protocol.

quality.title: B100A sensor not rejecting doubles on ML1
quality.summary: Sensor adjusted by maintenance to detect twisted pieces for jam prevention — does not detect doubles by design.
quality.status: Resolved — maintenance adjusted tolerance, sensor working as designed.

sanitation.title: S2 enrober allergen test failures post-cleaning
sanitation.summary: Enrober failed allergen verification three times after level-4 clean — multiple areas missed during disassembly inspection.
sanitation.status: Resolved — passed allergen test at 06:04 after re-wash and inspection coaching.

sanitation.title: Chocolate buildup on ML4 vibration area
sanitation.summary: Buildup under demolding area caused loud noise — 10-15 min gap created to clean, root cause is daily cleaning gap.
sanitation.status: Resolved — area cleaned during gap, suggestion to add to daily shift-change cleaning protocol.

opportunities.text: Consider adding enrober disassembly checkpoint photos to cleaning checklist — based on today's three failed allergen tests at S2 after operators signed off on cleaning.
Review cross-conveyor belt inspection frequency on ML3 — today's belt was shredding into product zone before operators noticed.
Add ML4 vibration-area cleaning to daily shift-change protocol — today's buildup caused 15-min unplanned gap and loud noise.
Consider adding motor fastener inspection to ML1 startup checklist — today's loose screw on M260 was a near-miss caught by operator.
